visual_features.overall_style: Conventional, Bootstrap-like web app with a practical, text‑first look. Minimal decorative elements beyond the club logo and a large colored header band. Feels administrative/utility-focused rather than highly branded or playful.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is created primarily through color bands, font size/weight, and layout position. The dark top navbar anchors the page, followed by a strong burnt‑orange hero band containing the logo and system name. Below that, bold section headings in a two‑column grid ('Submit New Entry…', 'Modify Entry…', etc.) stand out against the white background. Buttons are visually secondary (subtle grey style) and rely on placement under headings rather than bold color to signal actions. Links in body copy (blue, underlined) serve as tertiary focal points.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate whitespace. There is clear padding around the hero band and generous left/right margins inside the content container. Vertical spacing between headings, paragraphs, and buttons is consistent and gives each block some breathing room, though the overall feel is slightly text‑dense. Columns are not crowded and there is space between the left and right content groups.
unique_elements: Circular Bernese Mountain Dog Club logo with black illustration and text inside a light orange/tan disc
Full‑width burnt‑orange hero band under a dark navbar, functioning as a page identity banner
Simple two‑column information layout that behaves more like editorial text blocks than modern 'cards'
Use of Bootstrap‑style default buttons and typography giving it a recognizable framework look

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Appears to follow a 12‑column Bootstrap-like grid with a centered fixed-width container (~1140px) and ~15px horizontal gutters between columns.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Top fixed (or static) full‑width horizontal navbar, followed by a full‑width hero band; below that a centered content container with a two‑column layout on desktop; footer text at the bottom.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: 1) Dark navbar with brand and navigation links. 2) Burnt‑orange hero band containing logo (left) and title/subtitle (right). 3) Main content container with a two‑column section: left column for 'Submit New Entry…', right column for 'Modify Entry…' and 'Pay for Subsequent…'. 4) A full‑width (single column) 'Submission Instructions' block below the two-column group. 5) A light grey horizontal rule and a single‑line footer.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Strong left alignment. Navbar items are horizontally distributed (brand left, main links centered/left, 'Staff Login' right). Within the main container, text is left-aligned, with columns aligned to the same vertical grid. Buttons are aligned left under their respective paragraphs.
responsive_hints: Use of a central page container suggests standard responsive framework (likely Bootstrap).
Two equal-width columns that would naturally stack to single-column on narrow viewports.
Text and buttons are full-width within their column rather than tightly constrained, supporting stacking behavior.
Navbar uses a typical horizontal pattern that could collapse to a hamburger menu on small screens.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: The content flows in a mostly linear, top-to-bottom sequence with a structured hierarchy: (1) Dark navbar spanning the full width with brand text on the left, navigation links horizontally across the middle area, and 'Staff Login' aligned to the right. (2) Immediately below, a full-width burnt‑orange hero strip containing a circular logo on the far left and a stacked title/subtitle block to its right. (3) Below the hero, within a centered container, two columns sit side by side: the left column contains 'Submit New Entry for the 2025 yearbook' with explanatory paragraph and a primary action button; the right column starts with 'Modify Entry Already Submitted' and its text plus button, followed directly below in the same right column by 'Pay for Subsequent New Titleholder Page(s)' and its button. (4) Underneath the two-column row, spanning the full container width, a 'Submission Instructions' heading, description, and button are stacked vertically. (5) At the bottom, a horizontal rule followed by a single-line copyright notice.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Vertically, the navbar and hero band together occupy roughly the top 20–25% of the initial viewport. The main content container (two‑column area plus 'Submission Instructions') occupies the remaining space, with generous top margin above the first row and moderate vertical gaps between headings, paragraphs, and buttons. Horizontally, the main container appears centered with ~10–15% page margins on large screens. Each of the two primary content columns occupies about 50% of the container width minus gutters. The hero band devotes approximately 25–30% of its width to the logo on the left and 70–75% to the title text on the right.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderate density. Text is relatively detailed and paragraphs are multi-sentence, but spacing prevents visual overload. There are no dense data tables or lists; most blocks are one heading, 1–2 paragraphs, and a single button. Overall it feels like an information page with administrative actions, not a highly spacious marketing landing page.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: The visual flow follows a loose Z‑pattern: starting at the top-left brand name in the dark navbar, scanning across the navigation to the 'Staff Login' on the right, then down to the burnt‑orange hero band where the eye lands on the logo and then the bold white title. From there, the eye moves diagonally to the top-left main content heading ('Submit New Entry…'), then across to its right‑column counterpart ('Modify Entry…') and finally downward through each block and button, ending on the 'Submission Instructions' section and footer.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Buttons are simple rounded rectangles with approximately 4px corner radius. They use a light grey background (#F8F8F8–#FFFFFF), a 1px solid light grey border (#CCCCCC), and darker grey text (#333333). The text is medium-weight, sentence case, and sometimes followed by a right-pointing » character. Padding is moderate (about 8–10px vertical and 16–20px horizontal). There is no heavy shadow; they are essentially flat with subtle border contrast, reminiscent of Bootstrap 3 default .btn-default styling.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Likely implemented as <button> elements or <a> links styled as buttons (e.g., <a class="btn btn-default">). Positioned as block-level or inline-block elements placed after explanatory text paragraphs within each section.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Instead of highly stylized cards, the design uses implicit 'card-like' text blocks. Each logical section (e.g., 'Submit New Entry…') is a vertical stack of: bold heading, paragraph text, and a button, with vertical spacing separating it from other sections. There are no dedicated card borders or shadows; separation is achieved with whitespace and the two-column grid. The hero band functions as a visual card with a full-width background color, logo on the left, and text on the right.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No actual form fields are shown on this screen; only navigation to actions. Given the strong Bootstrap influence, inputs are likely rectangular fields with 4px radius, 1px solid #CCCCCC borders, white backgrounds, and comfortable vertical padding. Labels would typically appear above the inputs, left aligned, with error/success states using colored borders and small helper text. Overall density would be medium, with stacked fields rather than horizontal form controls.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Expected structure: stacked form groups (<div class="form-group">) each containing a <label> and an <input> or <select>, with full-width inputs under each label. Sections of the form may be grouped with headings or <fieldset> elements, and primary actions placed in a button row at the bottom.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Top horizontal navigation bar with a dark charcoal background (#222222). The brand title on the left is in a bright yellow/gold color, while nav links ('Home', 'Instructions', 'Contact') are lighter text (near white) with ample horizontal spacing. 'Staff Login' appears as a right-aligned link. Active or hovered items likely switch to a lighter or slightly colored background with underlined or brighter link text. The height of the navbar is moderate, with vertical padding around the links.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typical Bootstrap navbar structure: <nav> containing a <div class="navbar-header"> with a brand <a>, plus a <ul class="nav navbar-nav"> for left/center items and possibly <ul class="nav navbar-nav navbar-right"> for 'Staff Login'. Each list item contains an <a> link, with classes for active states.

ui_patterns.visual_description: There are few explicit lists; content is mostly paragraphs. Navigation itself is a horizontal list of links. In body text, inline links (e.g., 'Instructions') use a blue color (#337AB7) and likely underline on hover. If lists are used elsewhere in the system, they would probably be simple, text-dense items with minimal styling, separated by line breaks or standard bullets rather than heavy card or tile treatments.

heading.visual_style: Neutral, modern sans-serif with relatively standard proportions and moderate x-height, typical of 'Helvetica Neue' / Arial in bold weight. Headings are bold and straightforward, without decorative features.

body.visual_style: Clean, neutral grotesque/humanist sans-serif, optimized for readability, similar to Helvetica Neue / Arial in regular weight.

spacing_system.component_padding: Buttons and text blocks use approximately 8–12px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding internally, aligning with 8px multiples. The hero band has larger padding (around 24–32px) top and bottom.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections (e.g., hero to main content, main blocks to 'Submission Instructions', and above the footer) is roughly 24–32px, with intra-section element spacing around 8–16px.

interaction_hints: Navbar links likely change text color and/or background on hover and show an 'active' state with different styling based on current page.
Buttons likely darken their border and background slightly on hover and may show a subtle inset or focus outline, in line with Bootstrap defaults.
Inline text links (e.g., 'Instructions', 'specific entry') are blue and likely underline or change shade on hover to indicate interactivity.

Page transitions are probably static (no large animations), but micro-interactions like focus outlines on form fields and click press states on buttons would follow standard browser/Bootstrap behavior.
No evidence of complex motion; interactions should remain subtle and utilitarian to match the administrative tone of the interface.
